summary: Iteration 63 - Backend modularization & Stripe Connect refactoring tests. All 18 backend API tests PASSED. Verified: Auth endpoints (login/register), Config endpoints (18 countries, locale), Products/Stores listing, Cart operations, Stripe checkout with raw SDK (create-checkout, buy-now, checkout-status), Orders listing. Pydantic models imported from core/models.py working correctly. Constants from core/constants.py consistent.

minor.issue: When product has variants with packs, buy-now fails with 'Pack not found'. Code at line 3594 looks for product.get('packs', []) but packs are inside variants (variant['packs']). Works for simple products without variants.

passed_tests: POST /api/payments/create-checkout - PASS (Stripe checkout URL generated with raw SDK)
POST /api/checkout/buy-now - PASS (Stripe session created for simple products)
GET /api/payments/checkout-status/{session_id} - PASS (raw Stripe SDK retrieval works)
Pydantic model email validation - PASS (422 for invalid email)
BuyNowInput model validation - PASS (422 for missing product_id)
action_items: FIX: buy-now endpoint should look for packs inside variant (variant['packs']) when variant_id is provided, not product.get('packs')
critical_code_review_comments: core/models.py: 753 lines - All ~65 Pydantic models correctly extracted from server.py
core/constants.py: 116 lines - SUPPORTED_COUNTRIES, SUPPORTED_LANGUAGES, SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES, EMAIL_TEMPLATES extracted correctly
server.py: 12240 lines - Still large but models and constants removed
Stripe SDK initialized globally with STRIPE_SECRET_KEY at line 80
stripe.checkout.Session.create() used correctly at lines 3468 and 3700
BUG: Line 3594 - buy-now uses product.get('packs') but packs are inside variants[].packs[]
cart/add at line 2938 correctly handles variant/pack lookup - buy-now should match this pattern
seed_data_creation: Test users created with prefix test_iter63_*
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 63 tested backend modularization - Pydantic models extracted to core/models.py (753 lines), constants to core/constants.py (116 lines). Stripe Connect integration uses raw stripe SDK (not emergentintegrations helper). All Stripe endpoints working: create-checkout, buy-now, checkout-status. Minor bug: buy-now fails for products with variants+packs because it looks for packs at product level instead of inside variant.

stripe_checkout_raw_sdk.buy_now_variants: POST /api/checkout/buy-now with variant_id+pack_id - BUG: 'Pack not found'

model_extraction.validation: Pydantic validation working (email format, required fields)

mocked_api_notes: No mocked APIs - all features use real backend implementation with real Stripe SDK
